title: Header
description: A header object manipulates HTTP headers during request and response processing at the edge.

name.description: The name of the header rule.

action.description: The action to take on the header.

dst.description: The name of the header to modify.

src.description: A variable expression used to derive the value.

regex.description: A regular expression used for regex-based actions.

substitution.description: The substitution string for regex-based actions.

priority.description: The priority of the header rule.

ignore_if_set.description: Whether to skip the header rule if the header is already set.

request_condition.description: The name of the condition that triggers the header rule.

response_condition.description: The name of the condition that triggers the header rule on responses.

cache_condition.description: The name of the condition that triggers the header rule on cache.
